title: dryas octopetala subsp. dasypetala
intro: Dryas octopetala subsp. dasypetala, also known as mountain avens, is a flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of mountain avens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from skin issues to respiratory problems.
